title: Living in Boulder Vlog 7 - 23 - 2017: 59.1mi 5:15:30 6,391ft. Up James Canyon to Brainard Lake

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his cycling life in Boulder, recapping a previous day's ride up to James Town and Ward, dealing with a flat tire he couldn't properly fix due to an empty glue tube and a leaky spare, and previewing his upcoming ride up Sunshine Canyon. He also mentions fixing his bike's gears and picking up supplies from the bike shop before heading out.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: loves it, finds it fun and stiff
thinks it's great and treats it well (or tries to)
not ashamed to rest at home instead of making videos right away
used to find it really steep and hard but now enjoys it

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's 2.24 pm on July 24th and I'm just about to go on my ride.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a late start because I had to organize and fix the gears on my bike and fix the flat on my bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I got up kind of late and then I went on my ride up to James Town.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a photo of the bike station in James Town.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The bike station in James Town has tools, a shelter for the rain, and outhouses.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I uploaded my ride to Strava from my bike computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to try to upload a photo of a specific ride from my phone.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Riding my bike up the hill to James Town was amazing because it was steep and hard when I was younger.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My current bike is much better than the one I had when I was younger.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I rode out of the saddle and enjoyed it because it was stiff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went down to Ward and got a drink to put in my fridge.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought some candy at the store in Ward, like gummies for a dollar.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a flat tire right when I hit the park where Old Stage and Left Hand meet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I punctured the tire when I rode into the dirt part of the road and dug into it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I couldn't fix the flat tire because my spare tube also had a hole and my glue was empty.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: A biker walked by, and I thought about asking him for glue, but I decided to pump the tire instead.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I pumped the tire five times and a car offered to give me a ride, but I declined.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm excited to get my new map holder that matches the colors of my bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I also have gloves that match the colors of my bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I came back from the ride, I didn't have the motivation to make a video because I needed to rest.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today I'm going to ride up Sunshine Canyon because I love climbing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to go up to Ward and see if I can find more candy.
